import React, {useEffect, useState} from "react"; import {NavLink, useNavigate} from "react-router-dom"; import {useLogoutHandle} from "../../hooks/logoutHandle"; import {useMemberWallet} from "../../hooks/useMemberWallet"; import {BalanceArea} from "../../components/bank/BalanceArea"; import {isLoggedIn} from "../../utils/authUtils"; const Menu = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const logoutHandle = useLogoutHandle(); const {memberWalletInfo, loading, error, refetch} = useMemberWallet(); const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const checkLoginStatus = async () => { if (isLoggedIn()) { setIsAuthenticated(true); } else { setIsAuthenticated(false); } }; checkLoginStatus(); }, []); const handleLogin = () => { navigate('/login'); }; const handleSignUp = () => { navigate('/signup/terms'); }; return ( <>

{memberWalletInfo?.memberName || '회원'}

)}
